Class WorldMap

java.lang.Object
jogo.engine.WorldMap
public class WorldMap extends Object
Responsible for creating, maintaining, and managing the core game world grid. Holds a fixed-size matrix representing the map tiles where structures can be built.
Author:
Fabio Cruz, Tiago Silva

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    WorldMap()
    Constructs a new empty WorldMap with a fixed 7x7 grid dimension.

  • Constructor Details

    • WorldMap

      public WorldMap()
      Constructs a new empty WorldMap with a fixed 7x7 grid dimension. All map tiles are initially unallocated (null).

  • Method Details

    • getCOLUMN_SIZE

      public int getCOLUMN_SIZE()

    • getLINE_SIZE

      public int getLINE_SIZE()

    • addStructure

      public void addStructure(Structures structure, int coordinateX, int coordinateY) throws GameException
      Places a structure onto the map grid at the specified coordinates. Ensures the coordinates are within bounds and the destination tile is free before insertion.
      Parameters:
      structure - The Structures instance to be added to the map.
      coordinateX - The X-coordinate (column) on the map grid.
      coordinateY - The Y-coordinate (line) on the map grid.
      Throws:
      SpaceAlreadyOccupiedException - If there is already a structure at the target location.
      GameException - If the coordinates are outside the map boundaries.

    • getStructure

      public Structures getStructure(int coordinateX, int coordinateY) throws GameException
      Retrieves the structure instance located at the specified map coordinates.
      Parameters:
      coordinateX - The X-coordinate (column) on the map grid.
      coordinateY - The Y-coordinate (line) on the map grid.
      Returns:
      The Structures object at the given position, or null if the tile is empty.
      Throws:
      GameException - If the coordinates are outside the map boundaries.

    • isNotOccupied

      public boolean isNotOccupied(int coordinateX, int coordinateY) throws GameException
      Checks whether a specific map coordinate is empty and available for construction.
      Parameters:
      coordinateX - The X-coordinate (column) on the map grid.
      coordinateY - The Y-coordinate (line) on the map grid.
      Returns:
      true if the map tile is unallocated (null); false if it is occupied by a structure.
      Throws:
      GameException - If the specified coordinates are outside the map boundaries.

    • generateResources

      public void generateResources(int resourceModifier)
      Iterates through the entire map grid to trigger resource generation for all existing structures. Each active structure updates its owner's inventory based on its production rates and the active modifier.
      Parameters:
      resourceModifier - The current resource multiplier applied to the base production of each structure.

    • consumeResources

      public void consumeResources()
      Iterates through the entire map grid to trigger daily resource consumption for all structures. If a structure's level drops to or below zero due to starvation or maintenance failure, it is decommissioned and removed from the world map.

    • canInteract

      public void canInteract(int coordinateX, int coordinateY, Player player) throws GameException
      Validates whether a player is authorized to interact with a specific map coordinate. Checks if the coordinates are within bounds, verifies that a structure exists at the location, and ensures the requesting player is the rightful owner.
      Parameters:
      coordinateX - The X-coordinate (column) on the map grid.
      coordinateY - The Y-coordinate (line) on the map grid.
      player - The Player attempting to perform the interaction.
      Throws:
      StructureDontExistException - If the specified coordinates point to an empty tile.
      UnauthorizedActionException - If the structure at the coordinates belongs to the opponent.
      GameException - If the coordinates are out of bounds or any other map validation fails.

    • validateCoordinates

      public void validateCoordinates(int coordinateX, int coordinateY) throws CoordinatesOutOfBoundsException
      Validates whether the provided grid coordinates fall within the boundaries of the map.
      Parameters:
      coordinateX - The X-coordinate (column index) to validate.
      coordinateY - The Y-coordinate (line index) to validate.
      Throws:
      CoordinatesOutOfBoundsException - If either coordinate is negative or exceeds the map dimensions.
